name_cn:
❤️Mini Caramel Beige
Original leather lining with sheepskin D-Joy bag 2023 style. Fashion is truly cyclical, returning to the vintage Diana shape, rectangular bag with a short chain + long strap that is absolutely god-tier!! Strong retro chic, suitable for any occasion 😉 Definitely the ceiling of ladies, breaking out strongly sisters 👱‍♀️
Size: 16*5.5*10cm
